sentences.english: The number one thing on my bucket list is to skydive.
I've always wanted to know what it feels like to fall through the sky.
sentences.korean: 하늘에서 떨어지는 느낌이 어떤지 항상 알고 싶었어요.

sentences.english: I want to see the Northern Lights in person before I die.
sentences.korean: 죽기 전에 오로라를 직접 보고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I want to learn to surf, even though I'm terrified of big waves.
sentences.korean: 서핑을 배우고 싶어요, 큰 파도가 무섭지만요.

sentences.english: That's kind of the point though — facing your fears.
sentences.korean: 그게 핵심이긴 해요 — 두려움에 맞서는 거요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
